productName: Special Variable Home Loan Package <60% LVR

detail.name: Special Variable Home Loan Package <60% LVR
detail.description: Our Special Variable Home Loan Package <60% LVR is a great choice for those who have a larger deposit, or have paid down their home loan and would like a competitive interest rate .  You pay an annual fee of $395 and in return you’ll save an absolute bundle.

bundles.name: Special Variable Home Loan Package <60% LVR
bundles.description: Benefits of bundling the Variable Home Loan Package include, a reduction of 0.50% pa off carded rates for all fixed and variable personal loans and an additional 0.25% pa on carded term investment rates for amounts up to $250,000. Annual fee of $395 applies to all package home loans. No application fee for Tesla Powerwall Loan and reduced rate. In order to qualify for this product and rate, either an Offset, Access or 55+ Account must be held, and the loan repayments are to be made from this account.

features.additionalInfo: No loan application or monthly fee
Extra repayments can be withdrawn at no cost
Can be 100% offset when linked to a Home Loan Offset Account

fees.name: Application fee
fees.additionalValue: When you apply for a home loan linked to a home loan package

fees.name: Increase an existing home loan package
fees.additionalValue: When you apply to increase an existing loan linked to a home loan package

fees.name: Annual fee
fees.additionalValue: Payable annually in advance for each year a Home Loan Package is mantained

fees.name: Settlement fee
fees.additionalValue: Payable when a new loan is funded or our representative attends settlement

fees.name: Split Loan Fee
fees.additionalValue: Payable when you want to divide your total home loan amount into separate loan accounts. $150 for the first split plus $100 per split thereafter on same security for all home loan types

fees.name: Split Loan Fee
fees.additionalValue: Payable when you want to divide your total home loan amount into separate loan accounts. $150 for the first split plus $100 per split thereafter on same security for all home loan types

fees.name: Guarantor Application Fee
fees.additionalValue: Payable whenever we prepare guarantee documents for a loan.

lendingRates.additionalInfo: Owner Occupied Variable Home Loan <60% LVR Package (P&I)
